  Source   Edit

The Env(ironment) tracks continuation types and the variables of which they are comprised.

Imports

spec, scopes

Types

Env = ref object
  id: NimNode
  via: NimNode
  parent: Env
  locals: LocalCache
  gotos: Scopes
  breaks: Scopes
  store: NimNode
  camefrom: Scope
  seen: HashSet[string]
  scope: Scope
  c: NimNode
  fn: NimNode
  ex: NimNode
  rs: NimNode
  Source   Edit

Procs

  Source   Edit 
proc addGoto(e: var Env; scope: Scope) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
it's nice when we can do this simply   Source   Edit 
proc addGoto(e: var Env; k: NimNode; n: NimNode) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

add to a stack of gotos, which are normal exits from control flow.

think of things like return and if: discard and the end of a while loop

  Source   Edit 
proc addBreak(e: var Env; scope: Scope) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
it's nice when we can do this simply   Source   Edit 
proc popGoto(e: var Env): NimNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
pop a goto proc off the stack; return its node   Source   Edit 
proc popBreak(e: var Env): NimNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
same thing, but for breaks   Source   Edit 
proc insideFor(e: Env): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
does what it says on the tin, and does it well, i might add   Source   Edit 
proc insideWhile(e: Env): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
actually, this is the better one.   Source   Edit 
proc topOfWhile(e: Env): Scope {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
fetch the goto target in order to continue inside while:   Source   Edit 
proc namedBreak(e: Env; n: NimNode): Scope {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
fetch the goto target in order to break foo   Source   Edit

the type hasn't been written since an add occurred   Source   Edit

  Source   Edit 
proc maybeConvertToRoot(e: Env; locals: NimNode): NimNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
add an Obj(foo: bar).Other conversion if necessary   Source   Edit 
proc contains(e: Env; key: NimNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
you're giving us a symbol|ident and we're telling you if we have it recorded with that name.   Source   Edit 
proc makeType(e: var Env): NimNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
turn an env into a named object typedef foo = object ...   Source   Edit

  Source   Edit

  Source   Edit 
proc get(e: Env): NimNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
retrieve a continuation's result value from the env   Source   Edit 
proc newEnv(parent: var Env; copy = off): Env {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
this is called as part of the recursion in the front-end, or on-demand in the back-end (with copy = on)   Source   Edit 
proc storeType(e: var Env; force = off): Env {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
turn an env into a complete typedef in a type section   Source   Edit 
proc newEnv(c: NimNode; store: var NimNode; via: NimNode): Env {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
the initial version of the environment   Source   Edit 
proc identity(e: var Env): NimNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit 
proc rootTemplate(e: Env): NimNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
the template used to rename result in .cps. procs   Source   Edit 
proc newContinuation(e: Env; via: NimNode; goto: NimNode; defaults = false): NimNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
else, perform the following alloc...   Source   Edit 
proc rootResult(e: Env; name: NimNode; goto: NimNode = newNilLit()): NimNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
usually, result = rootResult(ident"result")
or, result = rootResult(ident"result", )
  Source   Edit 
proc defineLocals(e: var Env; into: var NimNode; goto: NimNode): NimNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit 
proc setReturn(e: var Env; n: NimNode) {...}{.raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}
Teach the Env that it should return the provided type.   Source   Edit 
proc rewriteReturn(e: var Env; n: NimNode): NimNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Rewrite a return statement to use our result field.   Source   Edit 
proc rewriteSymbolsIntoEnvDotField(e: var Env; n: NimNode): NimNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
swap symbols for those in the continuation   Source   Edit 
proc prepProcBody(e: var Env; n: NimNode): NimNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit 
proc defineProc(e: var Env; p: NimNode) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
add a proc definition, eg. as part of makeTail()   Source   Edit

Iterators

iterator localSection(e: var Env; n: NimNode): Pair {...}{.raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect].}
consume a var|let section and yield name, node pairs representing assignments to local scope; these are templates in the current incarnation...   Source   Edit

Templates

template withGoto(f: Scope; body: untyped): untyped {...}{.dirty.}
run a body with a longer gotos stack   Source   Edit 
template withBreak(s: Scope; body: untyped): untyped {...}{.dirty.}
run a body with a longer breaks stack   Source   Edit
